External_Id__c: REQUIRED. Unique upsert key for the row, e.g. EMP1001-2026-04-Monthly. Use this as the External Id when importing (Upsert) so re-imports update the same record.
Sales_Channel__c: Sales channel picklist value (Chanel set: Bulk Depot, District Bulk, CPD, Bread, ...). Must match exactly.
User__r.Username: REQUIRED. Salesforce Username of the salesperson. Sets the User lookup; Gross Salary and Profile auto-derive from this user.
PBIS_Policy__c: REQUIRED. PBIS Policy record Id (15/18-char), copied from the Policy record. Drives which incentive slabs apply.
Incentive_Period__c: Monthly or Quarterly. Selects the slab's Monthly vs Quarterly incentive %.
Is_Active__c: TRUE to include this target in the daily/batch recalculation, else FALSE.
S_D_Parameter_1__r.External_Id__c: Slot 1: S&D Parameter External Id, e.g. 'Bulk Depot | Total Volume Achievement'. Leave the whole slot blank if unused.
S_D_Parameter_1_Weightage__c: Slot 1: weightage %. The weightages of all used slots must total 100.
S_D_Parameter_1_Target__c: Slot 1: target value (volume / revenue / count) the achievement is measured against.
